entities.name: CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: A method of developing a representative subset of a germplasm collection to facilitate characterization and utilization

entities.name: MINI-CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: A further reduced subset of a core collection used for more intensive study and efficiency

entities.name: MOLECULAR CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The use of molecular marker approaches to identify and characterize genetic diversity in germplasm

entities.name: GERMPLASM DIVERSITY ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating the genetic variation within crop germplasm

entities.name: CROP GERMPLASM DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total genetic variation present within the germplasm of crop species

entities.name: IN SITU GENEBANKS
entities.description: The conservation of genetic resources within their natural habitats

entities.name: EX SITU GENEBANKS
entities.description: The conservation of genetic resources outside their natural habitats, such as in seed banks

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of a crop to improve its traits

entities.name: GERMPLASM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The systematic organization, conservation, and maintenance of crop genetic resources
